g.text: HNSW Greedy Search Algorithm: Two-Heap Structure

ul.li:
Invariants:
Candidates: dist(Top) = min(dist(C))
Results: dist(Top) = max(dist(R))

div.p: When the closest unexplored candidate is further from the query than the furthest result in our current top-k (efSearch), no further exploration can improve the result set.
